commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The hyenas shall cry in its towers, and jackals in their pleasant palaces: her time is near, and her days shall not be prolonged. Or jackals, which resemble foxes, and going in packs, will devour the largest creatures. (Bo chart) (Parkhurst in aje. ) (Haydock) But St. Jerome explains it of birds, Job xxviii. , and Leviticus xiv. Sirens, fabulously supposed to be sweet singing women with wings. Thannim denotes some great sea monsters, such as whales or sea calves.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
